finding: `logs/copilot/docs-review/` is excluded by the `logs/` ignore rule, so the JSON audit trail produced by this prompt is not committable.
suggestion: Add `!logs/copilot/docs-review/` (after the `logs/` line) so reviewers can commit the dated report folder.

finding: Page exists on disk but is not in the `Getting Started` sidebar in `site/astro.config.mjs`. It is reachable only via inbound links, making the Azure OIDC/RBAC bootstrap effectively hidden in navigation.
suggestion: Add `{ label: "Azure Setup", slug: "getting-started/azure-setup" }` to the Getting Started sidebar items (between Quickstart and Dev Container Setup).

finding: Page exists on disk and is referenced from `concepts/workflow-deep-dive.md` but is not in the sidebar — orphaned from navigation.
suggestion: Add `{ label: "SKU Manifest", slug: "concepts/how-it-works/sku-manifest" }` to the `How It Works` sub-tree (after `MCP Integration`).

finding: 15 broken relative links (`how-it-works/...`, `workflow/`) resolve under `/concepts/workflow-deep-dive/how-it-works/...` instead of `/concepts/how-it-works/...`. The page slug is `/concepts/workflow-deep-dive/`, so bare relative links must climb one level.
suggestion: Prefix the affected links with `../` (e.g. `../how-it-works/`, `../workflow/`, `../how-it-works/workflow-engine/`, `../how-it-works/agents/`, `../how-it-works/skills-and-instructions/`, `../how-it-works/architecture/`, `../how-it-works/mcp-integration/`, `../how-it-works/sku-manifest/`). Re-run `node site/check-links.mjs` to confirm zero broken links.

finding: Broken link `./agents/` resolves to `/concepts/how-it-works/workflow-engine/agents` — the trailing-slash + relative form treats `workflow-engine` as a directory.
suggestion: Replace `./agents/` with `../agents/`.

finding: Broken link `../concepts/how-it-works/skills-and-instructions/` resolves to `/reference/concepts/...` — Starlight resolves relative URLs from the page slug `/reference/architecture-explorer/`, so a single `../` only reaches `/reference/`.
suggestion: Use `/concepts/how-it-works/skills-and-instructions/` (absolute) or `../../concepts/how-it-works/skills-and-instructions/`.

finding: Broken link `/architecture-explorer.html` → resolves under `/azure-agentic-infraops/reference/` — wrong base.
suggestion: Reference the asset as `/azure-agentic-infraops/architecture-explorer.html` (or relative to `site/public/`).

finding: Uses `Azure AD` in current guidance (`Azure AD-only SQL auth`).
suggestion: Replace with `Microsoft Entra ID-only SQL auth` (keep code identifiers like `azureADOnlyAuthentication` unchanged).

finding: References `Azure AD only` and `AAD auth` in active troubleshooting copy (not a deprecated/legacy callout).
suggestion: Replace prose mentions with `Microsoft Entra ID-only` and `Entra ID auth`; keep configuration property names unchanged.

finding: `Authentication: Azure AD only — no SQL credentials` uses the deprecated brand.
suggestion: Replace with `Authentication: Microsoft Entra ID only — no SQL credentials`.

finding: `Ask your Azure AD admin` references the deprecated brand in active guidance.
suggestion: Replace with `Microsoft Entra ID admin` (or `Entra ID admin`).

finding: Secret label description says `Azure AD tenant ID`.
suggestion: Replace with `Microsoft Entra tenant ID` (the secret name `AZURE_TENANT_ID` is fine — it is a stable variable).

finding: Glossary entry `### AAD (Azure Active Directory)` is the only authoritative naming reference for the term in docs; it should lead with the current brand and treat AAD/Azure AD as historical aliases.
suggestion: Rewrite as `### Microsoft Entra ID (formerly Azure Active Directory / AAD)` and update body copy at lines 21 and 333 accordingly. Line 529 table row can keep `AAD` as the abbreviation column (covered by the `formerly`/`renamed` exclusion).

finding: Uses `Click the green "Use this template" button` — Microsoft Cloud Style Guide prefers `select` for UI verbs.
suggestion: Replace with `Select the green **Use this template** button → **Create a new repository**`.

finding: `Click the **Open Settings (JSON)** icon` uses the `click` UI verb.
suggestion: Replace with `Select the **Open Settings (JSON)** icon (top-right)`.

finding: `Right-click the generated .tar.gz file` is acceptable but mixed with `select`/`choose` elsewhere.
suggestion: Optional: keep `Right-click` (it is the canonical mouse gesture name) but ensure the follow-up verb is `select` — `... and select **Download...**` instead of `choose **Download...**`.

finding: Workflow step terminology mixes `Step 1`/`Step 3.5` (correct) with `Phase 2` (e.g. `Step 1 (Requirements), Phase 2`). The invariant in the prompt is `Step N` for the workflow spine; `Phase` is reserved for sub-stages within an agent.
suggestion: Audit `Phase N` occurrences and replace with `Step N` where they refer to the workflow spine. Lines flagged: `concepts/how-it-works/agents.md:90,134`, `concepts/how-it-works/workflow-engine.md:217-218`, `concepts/how-it-works/sku-manifest.md:132`, `concepts/workflow-deep-dive.md:169,535,565,610`, `concepts/workflow.md:355`, `guides/security-baseline.md:54`. Where the reference is genuinely a sub-phase inside an agent (e.g. `Architect Phase 6b`), keep `Phase` but ensure the parent agent/step is named in the same sentence.

finding: Three rows with status `Todo` in the action table. Acceptable for a demo as-built but should carry a due-date/owner note explaining they are intentional placeholders.
suggestion: Either close out the `Todo` rows or add a leading sentence: `Status "Todo" entries represent the demo's open follow-ups; they are not real production tasks.`

finding: Homepage routes new readers directly into Concepts; there is no single "first APEX run end-to-end" tutorial that walks Steps 1→7 with one project.
suggestion: Add a tutorial page `getting-started/your-first-run.md` (Diátaxis: tutorial) that walks the demo project through Steps 1–7 with screenshots, then surface it as the second sidebar item under Getting Started. Pairs with the Minimal-S IA path below.

finding: `guides/` mixes how-to (azd-deployment, hooks, e2e-testing), reference (security-baseline, cost-governance, validation), and tutorials (prompt-guide). Diátaxis purity is broken.
suggestion: In Minimal-S: rename sidebar group to `How-to & Tutorials` and leave files in place. In Full-L: split into `How-to guides/` (task-oriented: azd-deployment, hooks, e2e-testing, troubleshooting, session-debugging, apex-debug-log-export, devcontainer-hygiene) and move `security-baseline`, `cost-governance` under `reference/`.

finding: `concepts/workflow.md` + `concepts/workflow-deep-dive.md` together attempt to be the workflow spine but split into two unequal pages (overview + ~600-line deep dive). No per-step landing page exists.
suggestion: In Full-L: replace these two with a `Walk the workflow` sidebar group containing one page per step (1, 2, 3, 3.5, 4, 5, 6, 7, Post). Each step page is ~200 lines, cross-links to the relevant guides and reference, and uses identical `Step N — <Name>` headings. Move the existing deep-dive content into the appropriate step pages and retire `workflow-deep-dive.md`.
